summary:
Comprehensive audit of radar/ranking/{filters,keywords,scorer}.py completed successfully.

SCORING FORMULA VERIFICATION:
✅ Implementation matches README documentation exactly
✅ Formula: signal_score = base_score × pain_factor × (1.0 + |sentiment|) × maintainer_boost
✅ All components (influence_norm, engagement_norm, pain_factor, sentiment_factor, maintainer_boost) verified correct

EDGE CASE TESTING:
✅ Division by zero: Properly protected in _log10_norm() with max_value checks
✅ Negative values: Clamped to 0 using max() before log normalization
✅ Empty lists: Returns [] correctly without errors
✅ Extreme values: Log10 scaling compresses 10,000x difference to 2.5x (correct)
✅ Zero karma/engagement: Handles gracefully with 0.0 normalization
✅ Identical posts: All receive same score (1.5) correctly

FILTER LAYER ANALYSIS:
✅ KeywordFilter: Empty inputs filtered, unicode/emoji handled, patterns work correctly
✅ MaintainerContextFilter: GitHub URL matching works, signal counting accurate
✅ SentimentFilter: Threshold boundary (-0.05) behaves correctly with strict inequality

TEST COVERAGE:
✅ All 38 ranking tests pass (11 keyword, 8 maintainer, 3 sentiment, 3 pipeline, 13 scorer)
✅ Manual edge case verification completed
✅ No test failures

FINDINGS:
🟢 No critical bugs found
🟢 No correctness issues
🟡 Minor: Unused _log1p_norm() method in scorer.py (line 95) - cleanup opportunity
ℹ️ Pattern matching counts first occurrence only (design choice, not bug)
ℹ️ Zero sentiment weights edge case handled gracefully

FORMULA COMPONENT VERIFICATION:
✅ pain_factor: 1.0 (1 cat) | 1.2 (2-3 cats) | 1.5 (4+ cats) - CORRECT
✅ sentiment_factor: 1.0 + abs(sentiment) - CORRECT  
✅ maintainer_boost: 1.0 (1 signal) | 1.25 (2+ signals) - CORRECT
✅ influence_norm: log10(karma+1)/log10(max_karma+1) clamped [0,1] - CORRECT
✅ engagement_norm: log10(score+comments+1)/log10(max_eng+1) clamped [0,1] - CORRECT

FILES AUDITED:
- radar/ranking/filters.py (174 lines)
- radar/ranking/keywords.py (334 lines) 
- radar/ranking/scorer.py (133 lines)

DELIVERABLE:
Created comprehensive audit report: audit-report-task-003.md (1204 words)
Contains detailed findings, test evidence, severity ratings, and recommendations.

CONCLUSION: HIGH QUALITY implementation with robust edge case handling and correct formula.
